sentences.english: Why is getting enough sleep important?
Getting enough sleep is absolutely critical for both physical and mental performance.
sentences.korean: 충분한 수면은 신체적 정신적 수행 능력 모두에 절대적으로 중요해요.

sentences.english: First sleep is when your brain consolidates memories and processes everything you learned during the day.
sentences.korean: 첫째 수면은 뇌가 기억을 강화하고 하루 동안 배운 모든 것을 처리하는 때예요.

sentences.english: Students who sleep well before exams consistently score higher than those who stay up studying all night.
sentences.korean: 시험 전에 잘 자는 학생은 밤새 공부하는 학생보다 꾸준히 더 높은 점수를 받아요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Do you think competition is healthy or harmful for

sentences.english: Second lack of sleep weakens your immune system making you more likely to get sick.
sentences.korean: 둘째 수면 부족은 면역 체계를 약화시켜 병에 걸릴 가능성이 높아져요.

sentences.english: I personally aim for seven to eight hours every night and I notice a dramatic difference in my mood and productivity on days when I don't get enough.
sentences.korean: 개인적으로 매일 밤 7~8시간을 목표로 하고 충분히 못 잔 날은 기분과 생산성에 극적인 차이를 느껴요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: The Best Way to Relieve Stress
